'''Releqy A'Kla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was the daughter of [[Elegos A'Kla]].

==Biography==
In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], she was present on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] with the majority of the Senate that had survived the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Fall of Coruscant]], and supported [[Cal Omas]] in his bid to become [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]. After the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] won the [[New Republic Presidential election, 28 ABY|election]], Omas appointed Releqy [[Minister of State]] as well as appointing her to the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]], where she voted against the use of the biological weapon [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]]. <ref name="Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Releqy was originally planned to be introduced in the comic ''[[Specter of Thrawn]]'', before it was cancelled.<ref name="Galaxy Collector 4">{{CollectorCite|4|ComicScan|ComicScan: Comics That Almost Were}}</ref>
